zh.of Warburton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton是Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV和Alice Idonea De Lacy的兒子，於大約1236年出生在英國爾瑟 塔波。他於1269年與Marie Dutton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.of Warburton, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾瓦布爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton是Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV和Alice Idonea De Lacy的儿子，于大约1236年出生在英国爾瑟 塔波。他于1269年与Marie Dutton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton was born about 1236, in Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England as the son of Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV and Alice Idonea De Lacy. He married Marie Dutton in 1269, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton est né environ 1236, à Nether Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV et Alice Idonea De Lacy. Il a épousé Marie Dutton en 1269, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton wurde um 1236 in Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV und Alice Idonea De Lacy geboren. Er hat 1269 in Cheshire, England Marie Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton è nato il circa 1236 nel Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England come figlio di Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV e Alice Idonea De Lacy. Lui sposato Marie Dutton nel 1269, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli.

ja.Nether Tabley, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアネスエル タブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburtonは約1236年にイギリスチェシュアイアネスエル タブリーでSir Geoffrey de Dutton IVとAlice Idonea De Lacyの息子として生まれた。1269年にイギリスチェシュアイアでMarie Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton(은)는 대략 1236년 영국 체실르 네터 타블리에서 Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV(와)과 Alice Idonea De Lacy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1269년 영국 체실르에서 Marie Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

mn.of Warburton, Cheshire, England: Warburton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Nether Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV e Alice Idonea De Lacy. Ele casou-se com Marie Dutton em 1269, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton родился около 1236 г. в местности нетир табли, чешир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV и Alice Idonea De Lacy. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie Dutton в 1269 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Peter de Warburton nació aproximadamente 1236, en Nether Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Geoffrey de Dutton IV y Alice Idonea De Lacy. Se casó con Marie Dutton en 1269, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
